message:
test(h2): add connection-level WINDOW_UPDATE test for data frames

Verify that when a DATA frame consumes more than half of the
connection window, the H2 connection automatically enqueues a
WINDOW_UPDATE frame (stream_id=0) to replenish the peer's send
allowance. This confirms the low-watermark flow control behavior
that prevents throughput stalls on long-lived connections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
